name: Elite Semiconductor Microelectronics Tech Inc
summary: Elite Semiconductor Memory Technology Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells IC products in Taiwan. It provides memory IC products, including DRAM, flash, MCP, industrial grade, automotive grade, known good die, eMMC, and eMCP IC products; audio and power management mixed signal IC products; and wireless ASIC IC products. The company offers its products for use in various application, including industrial, automotive, consumer, PC peripherals, networking, wireless communications, audio, power, and IoT. Elite Semiconductor Memory Technology Inc. was founded in 1998 and is based in Hsinchu, Taiwan.
